$comment: Tier-2 DB-state fixture spec for the `folders` repo pilot (Phase-2 on-ramp).
This single committed file drives BOTH sides of the differential:
- the Rust port (quilltap-harness folders tier-2 test).
Keeping the seed AND the op sequence here keeps the two ports in lockstep.
SAFETY: testPepperBase64 is a THROWAWAY 32-byte key generated for this
fixture only. It is NOT the real Friday pepper and is safe to commit. Never
replace it with a real instance pepper.
DETERMINISM: every id and every timestamp is pinned, so both sides produce
byte-identical post-op state and the canonical dump needs ZERO normalization
(no id remap, no timestamp placeholder). That is the strongest tier-2 form;
the remap/placeholder machinery is reserved for later repos that cannot take

ops.comment: New root-level general folder; id + timestamps pinned via CreateOptions.
Rename seed folder `documents` -> `docs`; updatedAt pinned, createdAt preserved.
